extraction.one_line_summary: PEDERSEN Mads won reduced sprint after bonus point attacks whittled field, Trek leadout executed on uphill finish after top sprinters dropped on lumpy circuit
tactical_patterns: DSM sent ANDERSEN Søren twice on solo digs before breakaway caught, forcing other teams to expend energy preemptively.
Bonus sprint at 20km served as selection point where fastest pure sprinters (Jakobson, Bennett, Coquard) were eliminated by pace.
Trek executed leadout through uphill final kilometer with STUYVEN despite reduced field, suggesting planned exploitation of lumpy finish.

rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: positive: First WorldTour win in extended period suggests prior form issues resolved, won uphill sprint against all-rounders not pure sprinters
rider_signals.ANDERSEN Søren: positive: DSM trusted him for two solo attacks suggesting strong current form, tactical aggression forced opponents to chase
rider_signals.JAKOBSON Fabio: negative: Dropped before 20km mark on lumpy circuit, signals vulnerability on anything beyond pan-flat finishes
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: Eliminated same selection point as Jakobson, both top sprinters unable to handle prolonged lumpy tempo
rider_signals.STUYVEN Jasper: positive: Led out through uphill final kilometer effectively, demonstrates climbing strength beyond typical leadout role
